---
title: "Download"
editor: visual
---

:::::::::::: {style="display:flex; gap:20px; flex-wrap:wrap;"}
<!-- LOGOTIPOS -->

::: {style="border:1px solid #ddd; padding:18px; border-radius:12px; width:220px; text-align:center;"}
<svg width="40" height="40" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="#0e0740" stroke-width="1.5">

<rect x="3" y="3" width="7" height="7"/><rect x="14" y="3" width="7" height="7"/> <rect x="3" y="14" width="7" height="7"/><rect x="14" y="14" width="7" height="7"/>

</svg>

<p><strong>Logotipos institucionais</strong></p>

<a href="https://drive.google.com/drive/folders/1VcvIPrWsnVVJCqdQ0rwC2YPsA01Ch-sx?usp=sharing" target="_blank"
style="background-color:#0e0740; color:white; padding:10px 16px; border-radius:6px; text-decoration:none;">Download</a>
:::

<!-- DADOS -->

::: {style="border:1px solid #ddd; padding:18px; border-radius:12px; width:220px; text-align:center;"}
<svg width="40" height="40" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="#0e0740" stroke-width="1.5">

<ellipse cx="12" cy="5" rx="8" ry="3"/><path d="M4 5v6c0 1.7 3.6 3 8 3s8-1.3 8-3V5"/>

</svg>

<p><strong>CursoERBOT2026v1.0</strong></p>

<a href=https://drive.google.com/drive/folders/161p2ZrMnvdCHPFBxl7hZD7A49xBdSYev?usp=sharing" target="_blank"
style="background-color:#0e0740; color:white; padding:10px 16px; border-radius:6px; text-decoration:none;">Download</a>
:::

<!-- DADOS -->

::::: {style="border:1px solid #ddd; padding:18px; border-radius:12px; width:220px; text-align:center;"}

<svg width="40" height="40" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="#0e0740" stroke-width="1.5">

<ellipse cx="12" cy="5" rx="8" ry="3"/><path d="M4 5v6c0 1.7 3.6 3 8 3s8-1.3 8-3V5"/>

</svg>

<p><strong>CursoGoeldi2026v1.0</strong></p>

<a href=cursogoeldi target="_blank"
style="background-color:#0e0740; color:white; padding:10px 16px; border-radius:6px; text-decoration:none;">Em breve</a>
:::

<!-- SCRIPTS -->

<!-- R BASE -->

::: {style="border:1px solid #ddd; padding:18px; border-radius:12px; width:220px; text-align:center;"}
<svg width="40" height="40" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="#0e0740" stroke-width="1.5">

<circle cx="12" cy="12" r="9"/><text x="12" y="16" text-anchor="middle" font-size="8" fill="#0e0740"></text>

</svg>

<p><strong>R (base)</strong></p>

<a href="https://cran.r-project.org/" target="_blank"
style="background-color:#0e0740; color:white; padding:10px 16px; border-radius:6px; text-decoration:none;">Download</a>
:::

<!-- RSTUDIO -->

::: {style="border:1px solid #ddd; padding:18px; border-radius:12px; width:220px; text-align:center;"}
<svg width="40" height="40" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="#0e0740" stroke-width="1.5">

<rect x="3" y="4" width="18" height="14"/><line x1="3" y1="9" x2="21" y2="9"/>

</svg>

<p><strong>RStudio</strong></p>

<a href="https://posit.co/download/rstudio-desktop/" target="_blank"
style="background-color:#0e0740; color:white; padding:10px 16px; border-radius:6px; text-decoration:none;">Download</a>
:::

<!-- RTOOLS -->

::: {style="border:1px solid #ddd; padding:18px; border-radius:12px; width:220px; text-align:center;"}
<svg width="40" height="40" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="#0e0740" stroke-width="1.5">

<path d="M14 7l3-3 3 3-3 3z"/><path d="M2 22l6-6"/>

</svg>

<p><strong>Rtools</strong></p>

<a href="https://cran.r-project.org/bin/windows/Rtools/" target="_blank"
style="background-color:#0e0740; color:white; padding:10px 16px; border-radius:6px; text-decoration:none;">Download</a>
:::

<!-- ISCNIR -->

::: {style="border:1px solid #ddd; padding:18px; border-radius:12px; width:220px; text-align:center;"}
<svg width="40" height="40" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="#0e0740" stroke-width="1.5">

<path d="M2 12h20"/><path d="M4 8c2-2 6-2 8 0s6 2 8 0"/>

</svg>

<p><strong>ISCNIR Scan</strong></p>

<a href="https://drive.google.com/drive/folders/1gZbpwea3qfhBDjIe8fa_3sOy5WFDn8S5?usp=drive_link" target="_blank"
style="background-color:#0e0740; color:white; padding:10px 16px; border-radius:6px; text-decoration:none;">Download</a>
:::


<!-- DADOS -->

::::: {style="border:1px solid #ddd; padding:18px; border-radius:12px; width:220px; text-align:center;"}

<svg width="40" height="40" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="#0e0740" stroke-width="1.5">

<ellipse cx="12" cy="5" rx="8" ry="3"/><path d="M4 5v6c0 1.7 3.6 3 8 3s8-1.3 8-3V5"/>

</svg>

<p><strong>Protocolo INPA</strong></p>

<a href=protocoloinpa target="_blank"
style="background-color:#0e0740; color:white; padding:10px 16px; border-radius:6px; text-decoration:none;">Em construção</a>
:::

<!-- DADOS -->

::::: {style="border:1px solid #ddd; padding:18px; border-radius:12px; width:220px; text-align:center;"}

<svg width="40" height="40" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="#0e0740" stroke-width="1.5">

<ellipse cx="12" cy="5" rx="8" ry="3"/><path d="M4 5v6c0 1.7 3.6 3 8 3s8-1.3 8-3V5"/>

</svg>

<p><strong>Protocolo IHerbSpec</strong></p>

<a href=https://iherbspec.github.io/protocol.html target="_blank"
style="background-color:#0e0740; color:white; padding:10px 16px; border-radius:6px; text-decoration:none;">Acessar</a>
:::
::::::::::::
